
```tsx
function App(props) {
  const { data, config, onAction } = props || {};

  // Default data if not provided
  const defaultData = [
    { label: 'Jan', value: 65 },
    { label: 'Feb', value: 78 },
    { label: 'Mar', value: 90 },
    { label: 'Apr', value: 81 },
    { label: 'May', value: 95 },
    { label: 'Jun', value: 107 },
    { label: 'Jul', value: 120 },
  ];

  const defaultConfig = {
    title: 'Line Chart',
    width: 600,
    height: 400,
    yAxisLabel: 'Value',
    xAxisLabel: 'Month',
  };

  const chartData = data || defaultData;
  const chartConfig = { ...defaultConfig, ...config };

  const [hoveredIndex, setHoveredIndex] = React.useState(null);
  const [selectedIndex, setSelectedIndex] = React.useState(null);

  // Calculate chart dimensions
  const padding = { top: 30, right: 30, bottom: 50, left: 60 };
  const innerWidth = chartConfig.width - padding.left - padding.right;
  const innerHeight = chartConfig.height - padding.top - padding.bottom;

  // Find min and max values for scaling
  const values = chartData.map((d) => d.value);
  const minValue = Math.min(...values);
  const maxValue = Math.max(...values);
  const valueRange = maxValue - minValue || 1;

  // Calculate positions for points
  const points = chartData.map((d, i) => {
    const x = (i / (chartData.length - 1 || 1)) * innerWidth + padding.left;
    const y =
      padding.top +
      innerHeight -
      ((d.value - minValue) / valueRange) * innerHeight;
    return { ...d, x, y, index: i };
  });

  // Generate SVG path for line
  const pathData = points
    .map((p, i) => `${i === 0 ? 'M' : 'L'} ${p.x} ${p.y}`)
    .join(' ');

  const handlePointClick = (index) => {
    setSelectedIndex(index);
    if (onAction) {
      onAction({ type: 'point-selected', index, data: chartData[index] });
    }
  };

  const handlePointHover = (index) => {
    setHoveredIndex(index);
    if (onAction) {
      onAction({ type: 'point-hovered', index, data: chartData[index] });
    }
  };

  return (
    <div
      style={{
        display: 'flex',
        flexDirection: 'column',
        gap: '16px',
        padding: '20px',
        backgroundColor: 'var(--color-surface)',
        color: 'var(--color-text)',
        borderRadius: '8px',
        fontFamily: 'system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif',
      }}
    >
      <h2 style={{ margin: '0 0 16px 0', fontSize: '18px' }}>
        {chartConfig.title}
      </h2>

      <svg
        width={chartConfig.width}
        height={chartConfig.height}
        style={{
          border: `1px solid var(--color-accent)`,
          borderRadius: '4px',
          backgroundColor: 'rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.02)',
        }}
      >
        {/* Y-axis */}
        <line
          x1={padding.left}
          y1={padding.top}
          x2={padding.left}
          y2={padding.top + innerHeight}
          stroke='var(--color-accent)'
          strokeWidth='2'
        />

        {/* X-axis */}
        <line
          x1={padding.left}
          y1={padding.top + innerHeight}
          x2={padding.left + innerWidth}
          y2={padding.top + innerHeight}
          stroke='var(--color-accent)'
          strokeWidth='2'
        />

        {/* Grid lines and Y-axis labels */}
        {[0, 0.25, 0.5, 0.75, 1].map((ratio, i) => {
          const y = padding.top + innerHeight - ratio * innerHeight;
          const value = Math.round(minValue + ratio * valueRange);
          return (
            <g key={`grid-${i}`}>
              <line
                x1={padding.left - 5}
                y1={y}
                x2={padding.left + innerWidth}
                y2={y}
                stroke='var(--color-accent)'
                strokeWidth='1'
                opacity='0.2'
                strokeDasharray='4'
              />
              <text
                x={padding.left - 10}
                y={y}
                textAnchor='end'
                dy='0.3em'
                fontSize='12'
                fill='var(--color-text)'
                opacity='0.7'
              >
                {value}
              </text>
            </g>
          );
        })}

        {/* X-axis labels */}
        {points.map((p, i) => (
          <text
            key={`label-${i}`}
            x={p.x}
            y={padding.top + innerHeight + 20}
            textAnchor='middle'
            fontSize='12'
            fill='var(--color-text)'
            opacity='0.7'
          >
            {p.label}
          </text>
        ))}

        {/* Y-axis label */}
        <text
          x={20}
          y={padding.top + innerHeight / 2}
          textAnchor='middle'
          fontSize='12'
          fill='var(--color-text)'
          opacity='0.7'
          transform={`rotate(-90 20 ${padding.top + innerHeight / 2})`}
        >
          {chartConfig.yAxisLabel}
        </text>

        {/* Line path */}
        <path
          d={pathData}
          stroke='var(--color-accent)'
          strokeWidth='2'
          fill='none'
          strokeLinecap='round'
          strokeLinejoin='round'
        />

        {/* Area under line */}
        <path
          d={`${pathData} L ${padding.left + innerWidth} ${padding.top + innerHeight} L ${padding.left} ${padding.top + innerHeight} Z`}
          fill='var(--color-accent)'
          opacity='0.1'
        />

        {/* Data points */}
        {points.map((p, i) => (
          <g key={`point-${i}`}>
            <circle
              cx={p.x}
              cy={p.y}
              r={hoveredIndex === i || selectedIndex === i ? 6 : 4}
              fill={selectedIndex === i ? 'var(--color-accent)' : 'var(--color-text)'}
              stroke='var(--color-surface)'
              strokeWidth='2'
              cursor='pointer'
              onClick={() => handlePointClick(i)}
              onMouseEnter={() => handlePointHover(i)}
              onMouseLeave={() => setHoveredIndex(null)}
              style={{
                transition: 'all 200ms ease-out',
              }}
            />
            {(hoveredIndex === i || selectedIndex === i) && (
              <text
                x={p.x}
                y={p.y - 15}
                textAnchor='middle'
                fontSize='12'
                fontWeight='bold'
                fill='var(--color-accent)'
                pointerEvents='none'
              >
                {p.value}
              </text>
            )}
          </g>
        ))}
      </svg>

      <div
        style={{
          display: 'flex',
          gap: '8px',
          fontSize: '12px',
          opacity: '0.7',
        }}
      >
        <span>
          ●{' '}
          <span style={{ color: 'var(--color-accent)' }}>
            {hoveredIndex !== null
              ? `${chartData[hoveredIndex].label}: ${chartData[hoveredIndex].value}`
              : 'Hover over points to see values'}
          </span>
        </span>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

export default App;
```
